name: Schiacciata Con Noci (Cornmeal Flatbread With
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the yeast into the warm water and let proof for 10 minutes.
2. Stir in the olive oil.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, and salt.
4. Whisk in about 2 cups of the mixture with the yeast until combined.
5. Stir in the remaining dough until smooth.
6. Add the walnuts and knead into the dough for 10 minutes.
7. Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise until doubled.
8. Stretch or roll the dough to fit an 11" x 15" oiled baking sheet.
9. Cover and let rise again until doubled.
10. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
11. Just before baking, make dimples in the surface of the dough with your knuckles.
12. Drizzle with a wash of olive oil and sprinkle with salt.
13. Bake for 22 to 25 minutes, until golden.
14. Serve hot or at room temperature. This focaccia can be served as a snack or part of an antipasto, hors d'oeuvre, or simply used in place of bread.
